description:
## The change

fz-5j5 removed substantial machinery (outer 0..16 LFP loop, phase
1/2 split, 0..64 / 0..16 caps, prev_returns hashmap, InferredReturn
enum, compute_effective_returns). Comments throughout the codebase
may still reference these by name as authoritative wisdom.

## How to find them

\`\`\`
git grep -nE 'prev_returns|outer fixpoint|phase 1|phase 2|0\.\.16|0\.\.64|0\.\.\(N|InferredReturn|compute_effective_returns|type_module_pass|drain_and_register' \\
  src/ docs/
\`\`\`

Categorize each hit:

  - Stale and misleading → delete or rewrite.
  - Historical context (commit messages, design docs) → leave alone.
  - References a thing that DOES still exist (e.g. \`prev_returns\`
    might be a local in some other function) → leave alone.

## Acceptance

A single commit updating or deleting stale prose. No code-behavior
change. \`git grep\` for the above terms in \`src/\` returns only
historical / still-live references.

## Independent of

All other PROV tickets.
title: fz-PROV.5: audit stale comments referencing old typer machinery
